title: MoodifyAI
description: An emotion-aware AI application exploring how conversational interaction, music preference, and user signals can be combined into a more adaptive intelligent system.

title: PaperMind AI
description: A document intelligence project for asking grounded questions over PDFs, reflecting my interest in retrieval, language understanding, and research-oriented reading workflows.

title: AIDesktopAssistant
description: A local AI assistant using TinyLLaMA for voice-driven productivity, built to explore lightweight model behavior, agentic workflows, and practical human-computer interaction.

title: Password Manager System
description: A security-focused software project that strengthened my systems thinking, backend discipline, and understanding of trustworthy application design.
